confidence_reason: Clean seam boundaries, no cross-seam dependencies, clear data ownership, independent delivery possible

warnings.description: Uses OpenID Connect (Azure AD) for authentication on Create/Edit/Delete pages
warnings.mitigation: Implement JWT-based auth in Python backend, Azure AD integration via OAuth2

warnings.description: Image storage has two modes: local file system (~/Pics/) or Azure Blob Storage
warnings.mitigation: Implement file storage abstraction in Python (local + optional cloud storage)

warnings.description: Uses HiLo ID generator for CatalogItem.Id
warnings.mitigation: Replace with database auto-increment or UUID generation in Python

external_dependencies.description: Image file storage (local or Azure Blob)
external_dependencies.migration_path: Python file I/O or cloud storage SDK
JWT tokens with Azure AD OAuth2

notes: Seam is self-contained with clear boundaries
All CRUD operations are isolated within seam
Authentication is handled at page level (can be moved to API middleware)
Image upload is asynchronous (client-side) - needs migration to modern pattern
Pagination is server-side with fixed defaults (pageSize=10, pageIndex=0)
